parameters.jsCode:
return {
  newsId: $input.first().json.newsId,
  title: $input.first().json.title,
  summary: $input.first().json.summary,
  platforms: Object.keys($input.first().json.generatedPosts.reduce((acc, p) => ({...acc, [p.platform]: true}), {})),
  postCount: $input.first().json.generatedPosts.length,
  timestamp: $input.first().json.timestamp
}

parameters.subject: ⏳ Content Pending Approval
